title: FunctionalEconomy
description: Added the real economy and supporting items to the game.
body: The ‌**FunctionalEconomy**‌ mod is an innovative addition designed to bring real-world economic mechanics and deeper player interaction to your Minecraft experience. **‌Key Features:****‌** 1. ‌**Real Currency System**‌ * Implement a currency to create a unified economy. * Players can earn, save, and spend money through gameplay, quests, or trading. 1. ‌**Player-Driven Marketplace**‌ * ‌**Vending Machines:**‌ Set up automated shops to sell your items! Customize prices, stock, and even advertise your store. * ‌**Shopping:**‌ Use in-game "bank cards" to buy items by other players. 1. ‌**Banking & Financial Tools**‌ * Deposit/withdraw funds via ATMs or bank blocks. * Track transactions with detailed logs to monitor your earnings and expenses. 1. **Enhanced Server Economy**‌ * Foster collaboration or competition with player-run shops and auctions. **‌Why Add FunctionalEconomy?****‌** * ‌**For Players:**‌ Earn wealth by trading rare items, build a business empire, or become a savvy shopper! * ‌**For Server Owners:**‌ Create a sustainable economy with endless gameplay possibilities. Perfect for RPG, towny, or factions servers! **‌Installation & Customization****‌** * Easily add FunctionalEconomy to your modpack or serve ‌**Ready to transform your server’s economy?**‌ Download ‌**FunctionalEconomy**‌ today and let players trade, compete, and thrive in a living, breathing marketplace!
